questions.content:
You will hear two friends talking about a journey to work.
What does the man say?

options.text: The trains aren't reliable.
He enjoys driving his car.
He's thinking of using his bicycle.

The man doesn't use it because

he doesn't have time.
the changing rooms aren't safe.

options.text: He deletes them accidentally.

options.text: People never remember them.
